description: Routing decision contract - what orchestrator returns when routing a task

required_fields.reason: string - human-readable explanation of routing decision

optional_fields.driver_model_id: string - for courier/visual_tester, the model driving browser-use
optional_fields.throttle_wait_seconds: integer - seconds to wait before executing (if rate limited)
optional_fields.fallback_chain: array - ordered list of alternative destinations if primary fails
optional_fields.credit_check: object - credit remaining if using credit-based API
optional_fields.routing_strategy_used: string - which strategy from routing.json was applied

example_success.reason: web task, web_first strategy, chatgate.ai has no auth, gemini has browser_control

example_throttled.reason: API task, but gemini-api at 85% usage, throttling

example_credit_protected.reason: DeepSeek API has $0.50 remaining, below $1.00 threshold. Skipping.

fallback_rules.web_unavailable: Try next web destination, then cli, then api_free
fallback_rules.cli_unavailable: Try next cli destination, then web, then api_free
fallback_rules.api_credit_low: Skip credit-based APIs, use subscriptions or free tier
fallback_rules.all_throttled: Queue task, wait for first available, alert human if queue > 5 min
fallback_rules.browser_failure: Retry with different driver model, then different platform
